CO-DEFT; KING/SHERARD #19019160, ROBINSON/JOSHUA #19019164
/X JUDGE FLEMING APPEARS VIA ZOOM/REIN ORIG TC/CTORD 90 DAYS COUNTY JAILIS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF TREATMENT THROUGH THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/

/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:02-16-21/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 DAYS/CTORD:90 DAYS COUNTY JAIL BE STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETIONIN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM THROUGH APD/EMTERM/CTORD:DEFENDAT BE FITTED WITH ELECTRONIC MONITORING AND A CURFEW BETWEEN 8:00PM AND 6:00AM MONITORED BY APD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO POSESS NO BURGLARY TOOLS/PROB EXT:05-20-22/4019HALF/SAORD/SA1:DO NOT ASSOCIATE WITH JOSHUA ROBINSON/

/CAL:APD MTF FILING/OR/X:CASE WORKER OSCAR PENA PRESENT/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD: CURFEW FROM 8PM-6AM/WEAP//RX/CONTD SHORT FORM REPORT APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:03-11-21/CTORD:ASHORT FORM REPORT/PROB ADM REV/S16/CONTD:SHORT FORM REPORT AND TO SET APDMTR/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3Y:PJ 144D/CTS:144/IND/WS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DEF:ADMONISHED AS TO THE LIFETIME PROHIBITION TO OWNING, POSSESSING OR OTHERWISE MAINTAINING ANY DANGEROUS OR DEADLY WEAPONS, INCLUDING FIREARMS, AMMUNITION AND AMMUNITION LOADING DEVICES,/CTORD:ALL FINES AND FEES ARE PERMANENTLY STAYED WITH THE EXCEPTION OF RESTITUTION THAT MAY BECOME DUE AND OWING/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE STREET FORTHWITH AND THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT IS ORDERED TO REMOVE THE GPS DEVICE TODAY,/X:THERE IS A HARVEYWAIVER OF RESTITUTION, IF ANY, FROM THE DISMISSED MATTER AT #19002940/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFG/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-27-20/PPRF/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/CTORD:AS ADDITIONAL TERMS OF DEFENDANTS RELEASE,DEFENDANT SHALL NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 MILES FROM SFSD'S MONITORING OFFICE WITHOUT COURT APPROVAL, A CURFEW SHALL BE ESTABLISHED FROM 8PM UNTIL 6AM,SEVEN DAYS  PER WEEK UNTIL OTHERWISE MODIFIED OR TERMINATED BY THE COURT,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:SENTENCING & MOD OF TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/TE:4-6 WEEKS/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE-S23AND TRIAL-S22/DOP/

/CAL:CONTINUED PRELIMINARY HEARING/INVOFF:STEVEN SPAGNUOLO/X:CONTINUED SWORN TESTIMONY BY OFFICER DEREK CHRISTENSEN/EXHMA:PEOPLE EXHIBIT 36:MULTI PAGE DOCUMENT (DMV RECORDS FOR JOSHUA ROBINSON)/WIT SWORN:OFFICER DANIELLEDRAGO; OFFICER ALBERN CIUDAD/EXHMA:PEOPLE EXHIBIT 37: PHOTO OF CURRENCY/WIT SWORN:OFFICER NICCOLE RISSETTO/EXHMA:PEOPLE EXHIBIT 38: SKETCH OF TRAFFIC INCIDENT/WIT SWORN:OFFICER MATTHEW GIPPNER; OFFICER DOMINIC COYNE/EXHMA:DEFENSE EXHIBIT F-1: SHELL STATION VIDEO CLIPS/WIT SWORN:SGT, STEVEN SPAGNUOLO/EXHM:PEOPLE EXHIBIT 39:FLASHDRIVE (TWIN PEAKS VIDEO)/EXHMA:PEOPLEEXHIBITS 39A - 42 DESCRIPTION ON WORD EXHIBIT LIST/HTA1:1, 10, 11, 12/X:COURT CERTIFIES COUNTS 8 /BAIL:75000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
